ab: A ki aracɨ li ka Utagɨ.
Ma mi ne ma aracɨ dra ka Adriyu.
Ni ne ma aracɨ dra ka Mumuni.
Ikɨ cacɨvélé ka mɨngesɨle cɨvé li.
I ké kua sesa na kaka sovɨlé, aracɨ dra ka Sɨsɨgɨ, cɨvélé dra ka mɨngesɨle kesesanɨ
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Sɨsɨgɨ，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Sɨsɨgɨ, he is 11 years old.

ab: Terese ke na me iké sesa na gako sulsulte.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Kɨkɨ si kakinema sovlé ka madalamɨ namɨ thɨné.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Madalamɨ kɨ lungulungé, I sa se dra ne me ka, a ngu ru bua kename thɨkadane mua lungulungé.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Madalamɨ kɨ merariku na boua lɨsé, nuduru ma kɨneme teresɨ thɨné si lungulungé.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
